mainText:
Welcome to Bank of Entitlement, where your sense of entitlement is our top priority! Get ready to experience banking like never before.

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, picture this: I walk into my favorite coffee shop, strutting in my designer suit like I own the place (which, let's be real, practically do). I confidently order my usual double-shot, low-fat, extra foam latte with a sprinkle of gold flakes on top because, well, I deserve nothing but the best. As I reach the counter to pay, the barista has the audacity to ask for payment. Payment?! Can you believe the nerve? I flash my Bank of Entitlement card, expecting praise and admiration for gracing their humble establishment with my presence. But what do I get instead? A blank stare and a muttered "That'll be $5.50."Without missing a beat, I dramatically gasp, clutching my pearls, and loudly declare, "Do you not know who I am? I am Hot Josh, the CEO of Bank of Entitlement! I don't pay for coffee, coffee pays for the privilege of being consumed by me!"The barista, clearly intimidated by my presence, stammers an apology and offers me the latte for free, on the house. As I saunter out, latte in hand and head held high, I can't help but smile smugly. Ah, the sweet taste of entitlement-never gets old. And that, my friends, is how you assert your dominance with style and flair.
